introSection: Rotary Jungle Mouse (回転ジャングルマウス) was a Wild Mouse roller coaster built by Japanese manufacturer Sansei Technologies previously located at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan. The whole roller coaster was built on a rotating platform.
fullText: Rotary Jungle Mouse (回転ジャングルマウス) was a Wild Mouse roller coaster built by Japanese manufacturer Sansei Technologies previously located at Expoland in Suita, Osaka, Japan. The whole roller coaster was built on a rotating platform.
